properties.name: stripe.secret-key
properties.description: Stripe API secret key.

properties.name: stripe.webhook-secret
properties.description: Stripe webhook signing secret.

properties.name: stripe.price-id-monthly
properties.description: Stripe price ID for monthly subscription.

properties.name: stripe.success-url
properties.description: URL to redirect after successful subscription.

properties.name: stripe.cancel-url
properties.description: URL to redirect when subscription is cancelled.

properties.name: stripe.portal-return-url
properties.description: URL to return to from Stripe customer portal.

properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT signing secret key.

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.jwt.issuer
properties.description: JWT token issuer.

properties.name: app.subscription.skip-check
properties.description: Si true, omite la comprobación de suscripción Stripe (solo para desarrollo local).

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Orígenes CORS separados por coma (variable de entorno CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS).

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origin-patterns
properties.description: Patrones CORS (coma). Si no vacío, reemplaza allowed-origins. Ej. perfil local: http://*:4200 para LAN.

properties.name: app.security.auth-rate-limit.enabled
properties.description: Activa límite de peticiones por IP en rutas POST /auth/* sensibles.

properties.name: app.security.auth-rate-limit.capacity
properties.description: Máximo de peticiones por ventana en rate limit de auth.

properties.name: app.security.auth-rate-limit.refill-minutes
properties.description: Minutos de la ventana de rate limit de auth.

properties.name: app.frontend-url
properties.description: URL base del frontend (para enlaces de correo, p. ej. recuperación de contraseña).

properties.name: app.support.inbox-email
properties.description: Correo destino del formulario Contactar soporte (no expuesto al cliente).

properties.name: app.totp.issuer
properties.description: Nombre del emisor en apps TOTP (QR 2FA).

properties.name: app.sessions.cleanup.enabled
properties.description: Si true, ejecuta job diario que borra filas de usuario_sesion expiradas hace más de retention-days.

properties.name: app.sessions.cleanup.retention-days
properties.description: Días tras la expiración del token antes de borrar la fila (variable SESSIONS_CLEANUP_RETENTION_DAYS).
